race.comment: ECHO HUNTER (3) placed here in stronger on a heavy track and then didn't do a bad job at Doomben after being one of the worst into stride. This is much easier and she's likely to settle closer today. Gets the nod on an each-way basis. HEY CHARDONNAY (10) went close this track/trip second-up as favourite spiking her figures. Draws inside and has the tongue tie on for the first time. Fitter again and is a top chance. RETAINER (1) was quickly back on track winning a 65 easily over this distance at Rockhampton. Comes back home and the 3kg claim brings her right into it again. DIVINE DIAMONDS (2) is third up and has been racing in better in town. Suited and is likely to feature.
